summary: 我们通过分析组合给出了随机正则图系综上铁磁 Ising 模型的精确解。将配分函数表示为标记边双色图的生成函数，我们从这些图的渐近枚举中获得热力学极限下的自由能。对所得公式的简单分析揭示了具有平均场普遍性类的临界指数的二阶相变。

title: The Periodic Table and the Group SO(4,4): II. Double SO(4,2)-tower
abstract: A group-theoretic interpretation of the periodic system of elements is given within the framework of the weight diagram of the Lie algebra $\mathfrak{so}(4,4)$ of the fourth rank, where the four quantum numbers $n$, $l$, $m$, $s$ correspond to the eigenvalues (weights) of the Cartan generators of the maximal Abelian subalgebra (the maximal torus of the group SO(4,4)). It is shown that the root system of the algebra $\mathfrak{so}(4,4)$ forms a regular four-dimensional self-dual polyhedron (24-cell). The action of the fourth Cartan generator associated with spin leads to a splitting of the Cartan-Weyl basis of the algebra $\mathfrak{so}(4,4)$ into two structurally identical bases, each of which is isomorphic to the Yao basis of the subalgebra $\mathfrak{so}(4,2)$ (the Lie algebra of the conformal group). At this point, a four-dimensional 24-cell is projected onto two three-dimensional cuboctahedra, each of which defines the root system of the subalgebra $\mathfrak{so}(4,2)$. This splitting physically corresponds to spin doubling (two-valuedness). The structure of the energy levels of a periodic system is studied, the states of which (chemical elements) are represented as nodes of the weight diagram of the group algebra $\mathfrak{so}(4,4)$. The structure of the double SO(4,2)-towers of Mendeleev, Seaborg, and 10-periodic extension is examined in detail. The period doubling associated with the sequence of period lengths 2, 8, 8, 18, 18, 32, 32, $\ldots$ of the periodic system of elements is explained by the action of the fourth Cartan generator. It is shown that antimatter (Mendeleev anti-table consisting of antihydrogen, antihelium, antilitium, $\ldots$) is naturally included in the general group-theoretic scheme of description of the periodic table.
summary:
在第四阶李代数 $\mathfrak{so}(4,4)$ 权重图的框架内给出了元素周期系的群论解释，其中四个量子数 $n$、$l$、$m$、$s$ 对应于最大阿贝尔子代数（群 SO(4,4) 的最大环面）的嘉当生成元的特征值（权重）。结果表明，代数 $\mathfrak{so}(4,4)$ 的根系形成一个正四维自对偶多面体（24 单元）。第四个嘉当生成元与自旋相关的作用导致代数 $\mathfrak{so}(4,4)$ 的 Cartan-Weyl 基分裂为两个结构相同的基，每个基都与子代数 $\mathfrak{so}(4,2)$ （共形群的李代数）的 Yao 基同构。此时，一个四维 24 单元被投影到两个三维立方八面体上，每个立方八面体定义了子代数 $\mathfrak{so}(4,2)$ 的根系统。这种分裂在物理上对应于自旋加倍（二值性）。

研究周期系统的能级结构，其状态（化学元素）表示为群代数 $\mathfrak{so}(4,4)$ 权重图的节点。详细研究了门捷列夫、西博格和 10 周期延伸的双 SO(4,2) 塔的结构。与元素周期系的周期长度 2, 8, 8, 18, 18, 32, 32, $\ldots$ 序列相关的周期倍增由第四个嘉当发生器的作用来解释。结果表明，反物质（由反氢、反氦、反锂组成的门捷列夫反表，$\ldots$）自然地包含在周期表的一般群论描述方案中。

title: Wigner symmetries single out symmetric Wasserstein distances in all finite dimensions
abstract: We study the quantum Wasserstein distances introduced by De Palma and Trevisan associated with quadratic cost operators generated by families of self-adjoint observables. We first show that an arbitrary positive semidefinite cost operator is completely determined by the restriction of the corresponding Wasserstein distance to pairs of pure states. This allows geometric invariance of the pure-state distance to be translated directly into invariance of the cost operator. Within the class of nonzero quadratic costs generated by at most $d^2-1$ observables on a $d$-dimensional Hilbert space, we prove that the Wasserstein isometry monoid consists exactly of the Wigner symmetries, that is, unitary and antiunitary conjugations, if and only if the distance is invariant under unitary conjugations on pure states. Equivalently, the cost operator intertwines the adjoint representation of the unitary group and is a positive scalar multiple of the identity on the traceless subspace. We further construct explicit mutually inverse maps between quadratic cost operators generated by observables and Hilbert--Schmidt frame-type operators formed from their traceless parts. Under this correspondence, isotropy of the cost is equivalent to the tight frame property of the associated Hilbert--Schmidt operator. Consequently, a nonzero isotropic cost requires at least $d^2-1$ self-adjoint generators, and equality holds precisely when their traceless parts form, up to a common scale, a Hilbert--Schmidt orthonormal basis. Thus the geometric, representation-theoretic, operator-theoretic, and frame-theoretic notions of symmetry all determine the same one-parameter family of quantum Wasserstein distances.
summary:
我们研究了 De Palma 和 Trevisan 引入的量子 Wasserstein 距离，该距离与自伴可观测量族生成的二次成本算子相关。我们首先证明任意正半定成本算子完全由相应的纯状态对的 Wasserstein 距离的限制决定。这使得纯状态距离的几何不变性可以直接转化为成本算子的不变性。在 $d$ 维希尔伯特空间上至多 $d^2-1$ 可观测量生成的非零二次成本类中，我们证明 Wasserstein 等距幺半群完全由维格纳对称性组成，即酉共轭和反酉共轭，当且仅当距离在纯态酉共轭下不变。等价地，成本算子与酉群的伴随表示交织在一起，并且是无迹子空间上恒等式的正标量倍数。我们进一步在可观测量生成的二次成本算子和由其无迹部分形成的希尔伯特-施密特框架类型算子之间构建显式互逆映射。

在这种对应关系下，成本的各向同性相当于相关的希尔伯特-施密特算子的紧框架属性。因此，非零各向同性成本至少需要 $d^2-1$ 自伴生成器，并且当它们的无迹部分形成达到共同尺度的希尔伯特-施密特正交基时，等式精确地成立。因此，对称性的几何、表示理论、算子理论和框架理论概念都决定了量子 Wasserstein 距离的相同单参数族。

title: Approximate eigenfunctions for some aperiodic crystals
abstract:

Let  egin{align*} (k,X)

We show that, under some suitable assumptions on the family of operators $ (h(k,X))_{k,X}$ around an energy level $e_0\in {\mathbb R}$ and some points $(k_0,X_0)\in {\mathbb R}^d	imes {\mathbb R}^d$, one can construct localized approximate eigenfunctions $\Phi_\varepsilon\in L^2({\mathbb R}^d)$ of the operator $H_\varepsilon$ such that for $\varepsilon$ small enough and for some $m\in \{1,2\}$ and $\mu\in {\mathbb R}$,  egin{align}\label{eq:abstract} \|(H_\varepsilon-e_0-\varepsilon^{ rac{m}{2}}\mu)\Phi_\varepsilon\|_{L^2({\mathbb R}^d)}={\mathcal O}(\varepsilon^{ rac{m}{2}+ rac{1}{4}}). \end{align} with  egin{align*} \|\Phi_\varepsilon\|_{L^2({\mathbb R}^d)}= rac{1}{|{\mathbb R}^d/\mathbb L|^{1/2}}+{\mathcal O}(\sqrt{\varepsilon}). \end{align*}
summary:
在本文中，我们考虑  egin{align*} H_\varepsilon:=T(-i
abla_x+{\mathbf A}(x,\varepsilon x))+V(x,\varepsilon x),\qquad x\in {\mathbb R}^d \end{align*} 形式的非周期晶体的哈密顿量，其中 $T$ 表示狄拉克算子或薛定谔算子，并且$x\mapsto {\mathbf A}(x,X)$ 和 $x\mapsto V(x,X)$ 相对于某个格子 $\mathbb L\subset{\mathbb R}^d$ 是 $\mathbb L$ 周期性的。设  egin{align*} (k,X)
i {\mathbb R}^d	imes {\mathbb R}^d\mapsto h(k,X):=T(-i
abla_x+k+{\mathbf A}(x,X))+V(x,X) \end{align*} 是作用于 $L^2_{m 的一系列运算符per}(\mathbb{R}^d/\mathbb{L})$ 具有周期性边界条件。

我们证明，在围绕能级 $e_0\in {\mathbb R}$ 和一些点 $(k_0,X_0)\in {\mathbb R}^d	imes {\mathbb R}^d$ 的算子族 $ (h(k,X))_{k,X}$ 的一些合适假设下，可以构造局部近似特征函数 $\Phi_\varepsilon\in算子 $H_\varepsilon$ 的 L^2({\mathbb R}^d)$ 使得对于 $\varepsilon$ 足够小并且对于一些 $m\in \{1,2\}$ 和 $\mu\in {\mathbb R}$， egin{align}\label{eq:abstract} \|(H_\varepsilon-e_0-\varepsilon^{ rac{m}{2}}\mu)\Phi_\varepsilon\|_{L^2({\mathbb R}^d)}={\mathcal O}(\varepsilon^{ rac{m}{2}+ rac{1}{4}})。 \end{align} 与  egin{align*} \|\Phi_\varepsilon\|_{L^2({\mathbb R}^d)}= rac{1}{|{\mathbb R}^d/\mathbb L|^{1/2}}+{\mathcal O}(\sqrt{\varepsilon})。 \结束{对齐*}

title: The Fock Space Dynamics of Causal Fermion Systems: Non-Abelian Gauge Fields
abstract: A limiting case is worked out in which the causal action principle for causal fermion systems describing Minkowski space gives rise to the linear Fock space dynamics of perturbative quantum field theory including non-abelian gauge fields and Dirac fields.
summary: 提出了一种极限情况，其中描述闵可夫斯基空间的因果费米子系统的因果作用原理产生了微扰量子场论的线性福克空间动力学，包括非阿贝尔规范场和狄拉克场。

title: Multifractality of Semiclassical Measures on Star Graphs
abstract: We study eigenfunctions of quantum star graphs in the large edge number limit through the edge-mass distributions associated with their semiclassical measures. For generic edge lengths, we show that these distributions can realize every admissible multifractal scaling law along suitable subsequences of eigenvalues. We also prove a constructive result for quasi-equilateral star graphs. Starting from prescribed probability measures, we construct graphs and locate eigenvalues inside spectral clusters whose eigenfunctions reproduce the same scaling behavior. These results show that quantum star graphs form an explicit model realizing the full range of admissible multifractal behavior between localization and equidistribution.
summary: 我们通过与半经典测度相关的边质量分布来研究大边数限制下量子星图的本征函数。对于通用边长，我们证明这些分布可以沿着合适的特征值子序列实现每个可接受的多重分形标度律。我们还证明了准等边星图的建设性结果。从规定的概率测量开始，我们构建图并在谱簇内定位特征值，其特征函数再现相同的缩放行为。这些结果表明，量子星图形成了一个显式模型，实现了局部化和均匀分布之间所有允许的多重分形行为。

title: Quantum filtering and propagation of chaos for open quantum systems, with applications to quantum feedback control and quantum mean-field games
abstract: The theory of quantum filtering (of quantum continuous measurements) was developed by V.P. Belavkin about 40 years ago. Since then it attracted attention of numerous investigators including mathematicians, theoretical and experimental physicists. However, the rigorous mathematical theory of the filtering equations for mixed states in basic infinite-dimensional quantum systems remained an open problem, which was resolved by the author recently. This survey paper presents in full the mathematical theory of quantum filtering equations, their rigorous derivation from basic principles, the corresponding law of large number limits (propagation of chaos) and related topics. Applications to feedback control, quantum dynamic and mean-field games are discussed.
summary: 量子过滤（量子连续测量）理论是由 V.P.别拉夫金大约40年前。从那时起，它引起了包括数学家、理论和实验物理学家在内的众多研究人员的关注。然而，基本无限维量子系统中混合态滤波方程的严格数学理论仍然是一个悬而未决的问题，最近作者解决了这个问题。这篇综述论文全面介绍了量子滤波方程的数学理论、其基本原理的严格推导、相应的大数极限定律（混沌传播）以及相关主题。讨论了反馈控制、量子动力学和平均场博弈的应用。

title: Renormalization flows for 1D mixed states and a quantum Goursat lemma
abstract: Renormalization provides a framework for relating microscopic models of physical systems to effective descriptions at larger length scales. This procedure is studied for the boundary states of non-chiral two-dimensional topologically ordered models. The initial data consist of renormalization fixed points built from representations of finite-dimensional $C^*$-Hopf algebras, which are then perturbed by uniform on-site noise quantum channels and repeatedly coarse-grained. The resulting flows admit an intrinsic algebraic description in terms of completely positive maps on the $C^*$-Hopf algebra or, equivalently, positive linear functionals on its enveloping $C^*$-Hopf algebra. Their iteration is governed by convolution powers, and convergent trajectories yield new matrix product density operator fixed points, described by finite $*$-quantum hypergroups. This provides a concrete physical interpretation of such structures. For finite group algebras and their duals, we provide explicit classifications via Goursat's lemma for groups. Finally, we formulate and prove a quantum generalization of Goursat's lemma for finite-dimensional $C^*$-Hopf algebras, a result of independent interest, which gives an explicit structural description of all convergent renormalization trajectories.
summary:
重整化提供了一个框架，用于将物理系统的微观模型与更大长度尺度的有效描述联系起来。该过程针对非手性二维拓扑有序模型的边界态进行了研究。初始数据由由有限维 $C^*$-Hopf 代数表示构建的重正化固定点组成，然后受到均匀现场噪声量子通道的扰动并重复粗粒度。由此产生的流承认 $C^*$-Hopf 代数上完全正映射的内在代数描述，或者等效地，其包络 $C^*$-Hopf 代数上的正线性泛函。它们的迭代由卷积幂控制，收敛轨迹产生新的矩阵乘积密度算子不动点，由有限$*$量子超群描述。这提供了此类结构的具体物理解释。对于有限群代数及其对偶，我们通过群的 Goursat 引理提供显式分类。

最后，我们制定并证明了有限维 $C^*$-Hopf 代数的 Goursat 引理的量子推广，这是一个独立兴趣的结果，它给出了所有收敛重整化轨迹的显式结构描述。

title: Comment on 'Quantum Monge-Kantorovich Problem and Transport Distance between Density Matrices'
abstract: Friedland et al. [PRL 129, 110402 (2022)] proposed and studied a quantum analogue of the $p$-Wasserstein distance based on quantum cost matrices and quantum couplings. They conjectured that, despite being only a semidistance in general, this quantity is a true distance for a particular quantum cost matrix and for cost matrices in a small neighborhood of it. We disprove these conjectures by exhibiting an explicit family of triples of states for which the triangle inequality fails.
summary: 弗里德兰等人。 [PRL 129, 110402 (2022)] 提出并研究了基于量子成本矩阵和量子耦合的 $p$-Wasserstein 距离的量子模拟。他们推测，尽管通常只是半距离，但这个量对于特定的量子成本矩阵及其小邻域中的成本矩阵来说是真实距离。我们通过展示三角不等式失效的一个明确的三元组状态族来反驳这些猜想。

title: Observation of coherent flux-charge interaction in a gate-tunable fluxonium
abstract: Interactions that mix conjugate variables, such as the flux through a circuit element and the charge across it, lie outside the reach of the elementary couplings of superconducting circuits. Capacitors connect charge to charge, and inductors connect flux to flux, while no two-terminal element couples flux to charge directly. A native flux-charge coupling would thus serve as a circuit primitive in its own right, opening direct routes to non-reciprocity, protected modes, and unconventional readout. In this work, we demonstrate a flux-charge coupling by harnessing a voltage-tunable Josephson junction with parametrically modulated critical current, which mediates the interaction between a classical charge variable and a quantum flux operator. Relying on parity-selection rules in a hybrid superconducting-semiconductor fluxonium, we isolate the flux-charge coupling from other parasitic capacitive contributions and perform cross-quadrature-activated coherent control of states. Critically, we realize a flux-charge coupling that scales linearly with driving amplitude while keeping the transition energy first-order-insensitive to gate voltage. Such unconventional interaction broadens the toolbox of superconducting circuits with a critical missing component that enables the coherent coupling of conjugate variables.
summary:
混合共轭变量的相互作用，例如通过电路元件的通量和其上的电荷，超出了超导电路的基本耦合的范围。电容器将电荷连接到电荷，电感器将磁通连接到磁通，而没有两端元件将磁通直接耦合到充电。因此，原生磁通电荷耦合本身就可以作为电路原语，为非互易性、保护模式和非常规读出开辟直接途径。在这项工作中，我们通过利用具有参数调制临界电流的电压可调约瑟夫森结来演示通量-电荷耦合，该电流介导经典电荷变量和量子通量算子之间的相互作用。依靠混合超导半导体fluxium中的奇偶校验选择规则，我们将通量-电荷耦合与其他寄生电容贡献隔离开来，并执行交叉正交激活的状态相干控制。至关重要的是，我们实现了磁通电荷耦合，其随驱动幅度线性缩放，同时保持跃迁能量对栅极电压的一阶不敏感。

这种非常规的相互作用拓宽了超导电路的工具箱，其中缺少一个关键组件，可以实现共轭变量的相干耦合。

title: Shortcuts to Adiabaticity for non-Hermitian systems in Krylov Space
abstract: Shortcuts to adiabaticity (STA) reproduce adiabatic dynamics in finite time, but their counterdiabatic implementation relies on the adiabatic gauge potential (AGP), which is difficult to compute and implement in many-body systems and whose extension to open and non-Hermitian settings has remained largely model-specific. Here, we develop a general, diagonalization-free framework for engineering STA in non-Hermitian systems by representing the AGP in Krylov space. Starting from an integral representation of the counterdiabatic control, we recast the AGP as a nested-commutator series with controlled locality and generate the associated Krylov basis using the bi-Lanczos and Arnoldi algorithms. This reduces the exact or truncated AGP to a sparse tridiagonal or upper-Hessenberg matrix equation that generalizes the Hermitian construction. We demonstrate the method on a decaying two-level atom, where it recovers the exact drive and signals the exceptional point; on the interacting Hatano-Nelson model, where truncated controls rapidly suppress nonadiabatic excitations; and on a PT-symmetric Heisenberg chain, whose AGP norm detects the PT-symmetry-breaking transition. Throughout, the expansion converges with only a small fraction of the full Krylov space, offering a practical route to fast, accurate control of many-body non-Hermitian systems.
summary:
绝热性（STA）的捷径在有限时间内再现绝热动力学，但它们的反绝热实现依赖于绝热规范势（AGP），它很难在多体系统中计算和实现，并且其对开放和非厄米特设置的扩展在很大程度上仍然是特定于模型的。在这里，我们通过在 Krylov 空间中表示 AGP，开发了一个通用的、无对角化的框架，用于在非埃尔米特系统中工程 STA。从反非绝热控制的积分表示开始，我们将 AGP 重新构建为具有受控局部性的嵌套换向器级数，并使用 bi-Lanczos 和 Arnoldi 算法生成相关的 Krylov 基。这将精确或截断的 AGP 简化为稀疏三对角或上 Hessenberg 矩阵方程，从而推广 Hermitian 构造。我们在衰变的二能级原子上演示了该方法，它恢复了精确的驱动并发出异常点的信号；在相互作用的 Hatano-Nelson 模型上，其中截断控制快速抑制非绝热激励；以及在 PT 对称海森堡链上，其 AGP 范数检测到 PT 对称性破缺跃迁。

在整个过程中，展开式仅与整个克雷洛夫空间的一小部分收敛，为快速、准确地控制多体非厄米系统提供了一条实用途径。

title: A Sparse and Truncated State Vector Simulator for Peaked Circuits
abstract: In a class of quantum circuits known as peaked circuits, the goal is to predict the most probable bit string at the output of the circuit. Since these circuits are designed to have a sharp peak in their output distribution, in principle it should be possible to simulate them using a truncated state vector with a limited number of terms, or a fraction of the total probability mass. This approximate simulation can be carried out on a classical computer with a sparse representation that stores only the nonzero amplitudes of the state vector, in contrast to the dense representations that are common in most quantum simulators. For efficiency, all operations on the state vector should be vectorized to the furthest possible extent and, if available, hardware acceleration can also be used. This work describes how these requirements were met in an open-source implementation, and discusses its performance and limitations.
summary: 在称为峰值电路的一类量子电路中，目标是预测电路输出处最可能的位串。由于这些电路被设计为在其输出分布中具有尖峰，因此原则上应该可以使用具有有限项数或总概率质量的一小部分的截断状态向量来模拟它们。这种近似模拟可以在具有稀疏表示的经典计算机上进行，该稀疏表示仅存储状态向量的非零幅度，这与大多数量子模拟器中常见的密集表示相反。为了提高效率，状态向量上的所有操作都应尽可能向量化，如果可用，也可以使用硬件加速。这项工作描述了如何在开源实现中满足这些要求，并讨论其性能和局限性。

title: Improved GKP magic states from error-corrected non-Gaussian quantum states
abstract: Gate teleportation, together with magic state distillation, is a promising route towards fault-tolerant, universal computation. In the context of bosonic quantum computation, Baragiola et al. PRL 123(20).200502 (2019) showed that within the framework of Gottesman--Kitaev--Preskill codes, encoded magic states suitable for distillation can be produced by error correcting Gaussian states, such as the vacuum. Here, we show that applying the same framework to simple non-Gaussian input states can significantly improve the quality of the magic states obtained, reducing the overall resources for the complete distillation procedure. We focus on superpositions of coherent states or Fock states, showing that many can lead to improvements in the generation of high-quality encoded magic states, which in some cases reduces the resources required for magic state distillation by about a factor $3$. We also investigate the primary source of these improvements and find that, unlike what was previously conjectured, the suitability of input states is not fully explained by symmetry arguments. Instead, the best states seem to avoid projection near stabilizer states as a result of the error correction procedure.
summary:
门隐形传态与神奇的状态蒸馏相结合，是通向容错、通用计算的一条有前途的途径。在玻色子量子计算的背景下，Baragiola 等人。 PRL 123(20).200502 (2019) 表明，在 Gottesman-Kitaev-Preskill 代码的框架内，可以通过纠错高斯态（例如真空）来产生适合蒸馏的编码魔态。在这里，我们表明，将相同的框架应用于简单的非高斯输入状态可以显着提高所获得的魔法状态的质量，从而减少整个蒸馏过程的总体资源。我们专注于相干态或福克态的叠加，表明许多叠加态可以改善高质量编码魔态的生成，在某些情况下，这可以将魔态蒸馏所需的资源减少约 3 美元。我们还调查了这些改进的主要来源，并发现与之前的推测不同，输入状态的适用性并没有完全由对称性论证来解释。

相反，由于纠错过程，最佳状态似乎避免了在稳定器状态附近的投影。

title: Unveiling Semiclassical Structures in Quantum Chaotic Eigenstates Using Neural Networks
abstract: Physics-informed neural networks and neural quantum states have consolidated a new paradigm to analyze and discover physical phenomena through constrained neural parametrizations. In this context, we investigate whether the semiclassical structure of the eigenfunctions of a quantum chaotic system can be unveiled through unsupervised learning. To this end, we train a "quantum dictionary", formulated as an overcomplete autoencoder, that sparsely represents the eigenstates of the system, using as an illustration the quantum baker map. The only explicit physical information imposed on the dictionary atoms is their localization in phase space, without providing any kind of information about the periodic orbits of the corresponding classical system. The model achieves high fidelity in reconstructing eigenstates not used during training. By comparing the learned atoms with an independently constructed "semiclassical dictionary", we find that they spontaneously localize on the periodic orbits and develop scar-like structures. This result is interesting in two ways: a localization constraint is sufficient to recover nontrivial semiclassical organization from spectral data and at the same time periodic orbits confirm their fundamental role in the structure of quantum chaotic eigenfunctions. More generally, our proposed architecture opens a new route to learning representations whose atoms optimize other chosen physical properties.
summary:
基于物理的神经网络和神经量子态巩固了一种新的范式，可以通过约束神经参数化来分析和发现物理现象。在这种背景下，我们研究是否可以通过无监督学习揭示量子混沌系统本征函数的半经典结构。为此，我们训练了一个“量子字典”，将其表述为超完备的自动编码器，它稀疏地表示系统的本征态，并使用量子贝克图作为说明。施加在字典原子上的唯一明确的物理信息是它们在相空间中的定位，而不提供有关相应经典系统的周期轨道的任何类型的信息。该模型在重建训练期间未使用的本征态方面实现了高保真度。通过将学习到的原子与独立构建的“半经典字典”进行比较，我们发现它们自发地定位在周期性轨道上并形成疤痕状结构。

这个结果在两个方面很有趣：定位约束足以从光谱数据中恢复非平凡的半经典组织，同时周期轨道证实了它们在量子混沌本征函数结构中的基本作用。更一般地说，我们提出的架构开辟了一条学习表示的新途径，其原子优化了其他选定的物理属性。

title: A Quantum Reservoir Architecture for Chaotic Forecasting and a Test of Whether Its High Dimension Helps
abstract: Quantum reservoir computing uses a fixed quantum circuit as a feature generator and trains only a simple linear readout on top of it. This makes it cheap to train and free of the optimisation problems that affect many quantum machine-learning models. A natural worry is that the very large feature space the circuit produces might inflate apparent performance without adding anything real. This paper provides two things. First, it gives a complete, reproducible recipe for one such reservoir applied to forecasting chaotic systems, including how data is fed in, how the circuit is built, and how the readout is trained. Second, it gives a way to tell whether the reservoir's high dimension is actually doing useful work. We grow the size of the prediction problem and the size of the quantum reservoir together, so that extra capacity cannot be the explanation for any improvement, and we track a single stability number that measures how well behaved the readout fit is. On two chaotic test systems, a spatiotemporal chain and a shallow-water fluid model, the quantum reservoir keeps a flat, stable error as both sizes grow, while a matched classical reservoir does not. We report where the classical baseline is in fact stronger, so the comparison is honest. The result is a clean specification plus a diagnostic that other groups can apply to any reservoir whose features have a known scale.
summary:
量子库计算使用固定的量子电路作为特征生成器，并仅在其上训练简单的线性读出。这使得训练成本低廉，并且不存在影响许多量子机器学习模型的优化问题。一个自然的担忧是，电路产生的非常大的特征空间可能会夸大表面性能，而不会增加任何实际的东西。本文提供了两件事。首先，它为应用于预测混沌系统的此类存储库提供了完整的、可重复的配方，包括如何输入数据、如何构建电路以及如何训练读数。其次，它提供了一种方法来判断水库的高维是否确实在做有用的工作。我们将预测问题的规模和量子库的规模一起增加，因此额外的容量不能解释任何改进，并且我们跟踪单个稳定性数字来衡量读出拟合的表现如何。在两个混沌测试系统（时空链和浅水流体模型）上，量子水库随着两个尺寸的增长而保持平坦、稳定的误差，而匹配的经典水库则不然。

我们报告了经典基线实际上更强的地方，因此比较是诚实的。其结果是一个干净的规范以及其他小组可以应用于任何具有已知规模特征的储层的诊断。

title: Optimizing LZSM protocol for high-fidelity gates in open-system fluxonium
abstract: Quantum gates based on resonant Rabi oscillations are inherently slow for small-frequency qubits. They are also prone to errors due to counter-rotating terms. However, when the anharmonicity is sufficiently high, as in the fluxonium architecture, alternative manipulation protocols can outperform standard resonant driving. In this work, we implement fast, high-fidelity quantum gates based on a one-period Landau-Zener-Stückelberg-Majorana (LZSM) driving protocol. We derive analytical expressions that simplify the exploration of the parameter space while accounting for the multi-level structure of the circuit. Furthermore, we analyze the role of leakage, discussing strategies to mitigate it and identifying regimes in which it becomes the dominant source of error. Finally, to evaluate the impact of dissipation on gate fidelity, we develop a robust formalism suitable for analyzing the open-system performance of quantum gates in the strong driving regime.
summary: 对于小频率量子位来说，基于共振拉比振荡的量子门本质上很慢。由于反向旋转项，它们也容易出错。然而，当非谐性足够高时（如 Fluxium 架构中那样），替代操纵协议的性能可以优于标准谐振驱动。在这项工作中，我们基于单周期 Landau-Zener-Stückelberg-Majorana (LZSM) 驱动协议实现快速、高保真量子门。我们推导了解析表达式，简化了参数空间的探索，同时考虑了电路的多级结构。此外，我们分析了泄漏的作用，讨论了缓解泄漏的策略，并确定了泄漏成为主要误差源的情况。最后，为了评估耗散对门保真度的影响，我们开发了一种稳健的形式体系，适合分析强驱动状态下量子门的开放系统性能。

title: Nuclear Many-Body Systems as Benchmarks for Quantum Computing
abstract: We present a framework for benchmarking quantum algorithms for nuclear many-body systems based on realistic nuclear Hamiltonians such as chiral effective field theory. To this effect we introduce a workflow that maps nuclear interactions in second quantization formalism to qubit Hamiltonians. This enables the systematic construction of benchmark instances spanning no-core and valence-space formulations with two-body (NN) and selected three-body (3N) interactions. Then, we proceed to provide resource estimates for three representative eigenvalue algorithms: Quantum Phase Estimation, Quantum Krylov methods, and Observable Dynamic Mode Decomposition. We compare their resource requirements in terms of T-gate counts and system size, and examine the impact of model-space choices and many-body interactions. The primitives included in our analysis are Trotterization, Qubitization, and Quantum Singular Value Transformation. Our results quantify scaling trends across algorithms and problem classes, and provide a basis for consistent comparisons of quantum approaches to nuclear many-body problems. The implementation is provided by the NuQuLib software stack.
summary: 我们提出了一个基于现实核哈密顿量（例如手性有效场理论）的核多体系统量子算法基准测试框架。为此，我们引入了一个工作流程，将第二量子化形式中的核相互作用映射到量子位哈密顿量。这使得能够系统地构建跨越无核和价空间公式的基准实例，以及二体（NN）和选定的三体（3N）相互作用。然后，我们继续为三种代表性特征值算法提供资源估计：量子相位估计、量子 Krylov 方法和可观察动态模式分解。我们从 T 门数量和系统规模方面比较了它们的资源需求，并检查了模型空间选择和多体交互的影响。我们分析中包含的原语是 Trotterization、Qubitization 和 Quantum Singular Value Transformation。我们的结果量化了算法和问题类别的扩展趋势，并为核多体问题的量子方法的一致比较提供了基础。该实现由 NuQuLib 软件堆栈提供。

title: Experimental demonstration of entanglement sudden death induced by natural dissipation
abstract: Any quantum system inevitably interacts with its natural environment, which can be modeled as a Markovian reservoir consisting of a continuum of electromagnetic field modes. The quantum coherence of qubits in a zero-temperature natural reservoir decays asymptotically, whereas the quantum entanglement of two qubits coupled to such reservoirs may disappear in a finite time. This phenomenon, referred to as entanglement sudden death (ESD), has been simulated with artificially engineered dissipative channels, but ESD induced by natural dissipative channels has not been confirmed. We here present the first demonstration of natural-dissipation-induced ESD for two photonic qubits, each stored in a leaky resonator of a superconducting circuit. The disentanglement dynamics of the two photonic qubits is monitored with two ancilla superconducting qubits, which can be controllably coupled to the corresponding leaky resonators. The techniques developed in our experiment pave the way for experimental exploration of entanglement dynamics in natural environments.
summary: 任何量子系统都不可避免地与其自然环境相互作用，可以将其建模为由连续电磁场模式组成的马尔可夫储层。零温自然储层中量子位的量子相干性渐近衰减，而耦合到此类储层的两个量子位的量子纠缠可能会在有限时间内消失。这种现象被称为纠缠猝死（ESD），已用人工设计的耗散通道进行了模拟，但自然耗散通道引起的 ESD 尚未得到证实。我们在这里首次演示了两个光子量子位的自然耗散引起的 ESD，每个光子量子位都存储在超导电路的泄漏谐振器中。两个光子量子位的解缠结动态由两个辅助超导量子位监控，这两个辅助超导量子位可以可控地耦合到相应的泄漏谐振器。我们实验中开发的技术为自然环境中纠缠动力学的实验探索铺平了道路。

title: Equivariant Quantum Clustering with Differential Privacy: Parameter-Efficient Privacy-Preserving Analysis Across Heterogeneous Sensitive Datasets
abstract: Privacy-preserving clustering is critical for analyzing sensitive data in healthcare, cybersecurity, and enterprise applications, where maintaining data confidentiality must be balanced with analytical performance. This paper presents Equivariant Quantum Clustering (EQC), a parameter-efficient framework that integrates symmetry-aware quantum circuits with differential privacy to improve the privacy-utility tradeoff. EQC employs p4m equivariant parameter sharing to reduce circuit complexity while preserving informative feature representations. The framework is evaluated on three privacy-sensitive datasets: NSL-KDD, CERT Insider Threat v6.2, and a synthetic MIMIC-III clinical dataset. On the NSL-KDD benchmark, EQC achieves 79.3% clustering accuracy while reducing membership inference attack success to 38.3% under a privacy budget of {\epsilon} = 1.0 and {\delta} = 10^-5, outperforming representative classical and quantum baselines. Ablation studies indicate that the performance gains primarily arise from parameter-efficient circuit design combined with differential privacy. The results demonstrate that EQC provides a practical quantum-ready framework for secure and privacy-preserving clustering across heterogeneous sensitive datasets.
summary:
隐私保护集群对于分析医疗保健、网络安全和企业应用程序中的敏感数据至关重要，其中维护数据机密性必须与分析性能相平衡。本文提出了等变量子聚类（EQC），这是一种参数高效的框架，它将对称感知量子电路与差分隐私相结合，以改善隐私与效用的权衡。 EQC 采用 p4m 等变参数共享来降低电路复杂性，同时保留信息丰富的特征表示。该框架在三个隐私敏感数据集上进行评估：NSL-KDD、CERT Insider Threat v6.2 和合成 MIMIC-III 临床数据集。在 NSL-KDD 基准上，EQC 实现了 79.3% 的聚类准确率，同时在 {\epsilon} = 1.0 和 {\delta} = 10^-5 的隐私预算下将成员推理攻击成功率降低至 38.3%，优于代表性的经典和量子基线。消融研究表明，性能增益主要来自于参数高效的电路设计与差分隐私的结合。

结果表明，EQC 为跨异构敏感数据集的安全和隐私保护集群提供了实用的量子就绪框架。

title: Center-of-Mass Bounds and Harmonic Extremality
abstract: We study the center-of-mass observable in one-dimensional many-body systems with translation-invariant interactions and extend the harmonic-rigidity mechanism from the one-body setting to an interacting many-body problem. We prove a sharp upper bound on the ground-state center-of-mass fluctuation in terms of the active spectral gap associated with the center-of-mass probe, and show that this bound does not require any positivity assumption on the ground state. In the positivity class, we characterize the equality case completely. Exact saturation occurs if and only if the external one-body traps are harmonic with a common frequency, while the interaction may remain arbitrary within the translation-invariant class. We also identify a natural rigidity defect measuring deviation from the harmonic extremal situation and prove quantitative near-saturation estimates controlling both the variance deficit and the spectral weight outside the first active shell. In this way, the paper establishes harmonic confinement as the unique static extremizer for the rigid interacting center-of-mass mode at fixed active gap.
summary: 我们研究具有平移不变相互作用的一维多体系统中的可观测质心，并将调和刚性机制从单体设置扩展到相互作用的多体问题。我们证明了与质心探测器相关的有效光谱间隙的基态质心涨落的尖锐上限，并表明该界限不需要对基态进行任何正性假设。在积极性课程中，我们完全描述了平等情况。当且仅当外部单体陷阱与公共频率谐波时，才会发生精确饱和，而在平移不变类中相互作用可能保持任意。我们还确定了测量与谐波极值情况的偏差的自然刚性缺陷，并证明了控制第一个活动壳之外的方差赤字和谱权重的定量近饱和估计。通过这种方式，本文将谐波限制建立为固定活动间隙下刚性相互作用质心模式的唯一静态极值器。

title: Decomposition-Based QAOA for Maximum Coverage Location Problem in Satellite Constellation Design
abstract: An increase in earth observation missions has increased the demand of efficient design and optimization of satellite constellations. Maximizing coverage of the target while effectively utilizing the limited orbital resources is one of the critical design challenges for complex combinatorial optimization problems. The maximal covering location problem (MCLP), serves as a base for orbital coverage modeling, is NP-hard and computationally intractable for large-constellation instances. Using heuristics, metaheuristics, and mixed-integer linear programming, classical solvers have achieved optimal or near-optimal results, yet their scalability is limited as the problem size increases. Quantum computing advancements, including the quantum approximate optimization algorithms, offer a potential solution to NP-hard combinatorial optimization problems. Current quantum hardware limitations, such as low qubit counts and circuit depth, restrict solutions for small-scale instance problems. To address this challenge, this paper proposes a scalable quantum optimization framework for MCLP in satellite constellation design. A decomposition-based quantum methodology is proposed, in which large MCLP instances are partitioned into subgraphs by classical decomposition, optimized independently via quantum optimization circuits, and combined using quantum reconstruction strategies. Computational results across different constellation sizes reveal better scalability in less time while maintaining competitive coverage performance compared to classical solvers.
summary:
对地观测任务的增加增加了对卫星星座的高效设计和优化的需求。在有效利用有限轨道资源的同时最大化目标覆盖范围是复杂组合优化问题的关键设计挑战之一。最大覆盖位置问题 (MCLP) 作为轨道覆盖建模的基础，对于大型星座实例来说是 NP 困难且计算困难的。使用启发式、元启发式和混合整数线性规划，经典求解器已经实现了最优或接近最优的结果，但随着问题规模的增加，它们的可扩展性受到限制。量子计算的进步，包括量子近似优化算法，为 NP 难组合优化问题提供了潜在的解决方案。当前的量子硬件限制，例如低量子位计数和电路深度，限制了小规模实例问题的解决方案。为了应对这一挑战，本文提出了一种用于卫星星座设计中的 MCLP 的可扩展量子优化框架。

提出了一种基于分解的量子方法，其中通过经典分解将大型 MCLP 实例划分为子图，通过量子优化电路独立优化，并使用量子重构策略进行组合。与传统求解器相比，不同星座大小的计算结果显示出在更短的时间内具有更好的可扩展性，同时保持有竞争力的覆盖性能。

title: Continuous-Variable MIMO THz Quantum Secret Sharing: Gaussian-modulation and Passive-modulation
abstract: Although quantum key distribution (QKD) enables information-theoretically secure key distribution, it is mainly designed for point-to-point communication and cannot directly support multi-user collaborative scenarios. To address this limitation, quantum secret sharing (QSS) has been proposed to enable secure multiparty key sharing. However, most existing QSS protocols rely on a single-input single-output (SISO) channel, which limits the achievable secret key rate (SKR) and transmission distance. This paper proposes a continuous-variable (CV) QSS protocol based on a multiple-input multiple-output (MIMO) architecture operating in the terahertz (THz) band. In the proposed scheme, transmit-receive beamforming decomposes the MIMO channel into multiple parallel SISO subchannels, thereby improving both the SKR and transmission distance. We describe the QSS transmission procedure and derive the SKR expressions for eight protocol variants under Gaussian collective attacks. Specifically, Gaussian modulation and passive modulation are considered at the transmitter, while homodyne and heterodyne detection are considered at the receiver. Both asymptotic and composable finite-size SKR formulas are derived to characterize the ideal upper-bound performance and the achievable performance under finite resources, respectively. Simulation results show that, under ideal assumptions including perfect channel state information, perfect phase synchronization, and ideal beamforming, the Gaussian-modulation protocol with a 32 x 32 antenna configuration and the passive-modulation protocol with a 1024 x 1024 antenna configuration achieve transmission distances of 14.99 m and 160 m in the atmospheric channel, respectively. These results provide an idealized theoretical benchmark for evaluating the potential performance gains of MIMO-assisted THz CV-QSS in indoor and short-range outdoor wireless networks.
summary:
虽然量子密钥分发（QKD）能够实现信息理论上安全的密钥分发，但它主要是为点对点通信而设计的，不能直接支持多用户协作场景。为了解决这一限制，提出了量子秘密共享（QSS）来实现安全的多方密钥共享。然而，大多数现有的 QSS 协议依赖于单输入单输出 (SISO) 通道，这限制了可实现的密钥速率 (SKR) 和传输距离。本文提出了一种基于太赫兹 (THz) 频段的多输入多输出 (MIMO) 架构的连续变量 (CV) QSS 协议。在所提出的方案中，发送-接收波束成形将MIMO信道分解为多个并行的SISO子信道，从而提高SKR和传输距离。我们描述了 QSS 传输过程，并推导了高斯集体攻击下八种协议变体的 SKR 表达式。具体而言，在发射机处考虑高斯调制和无源调制，而在接收机处考虑零差和外差检测。

推导了渐近和可组合的有限大小 SKR 公式，分别表征理想的上限性能和有限资源下可实现的性能。仿真结果表明，在完美信道状态信息、完美相位同步和理想波束成形等理想假设下，32 x 32天线配置的高斯调制协议和1024 x 1024天线配置的无源调制协议在大气信道中的传输距离分别达到14.99 m和160 m。这些结果为评估 MIMO 辅助太赫兹 CV-QSS 在室内和短距离室外无线网络中的潜在性能增益提供了理想的理论基准。

title: Efficient Pauli-decomposition and multistage state-refinement for tensor network based differential equation solver
abstract: Classical numerical techniques for solving partial differential equations (PDEs) become computationally expensive as the dimension of the discretized differential operator increases. For PDEs giving rise to Sturm--Liouville problems, tensor network (TN) methods can be highly productive: an operator of dimension $N\times N$ can be represented as a matrix product operator (MPO) using only $n=\log_2(N)$ qubits, enabling computation of eigenvalues and eigenvectors via imaginary time evolution (ITE). However, this remains computationally challenging. First, most methods for generating MPOs of large operators without explicit tensor-product structure require prohibitively large memory. Second, the number of Trotterization steps for convergence in conventional ITE increases rapidly with $n$. We present techniques to mitigate both challenges for certain sparse, structured differential operators. To address the first, we construct the MPO by expanding the operator in the Pauli-string basis, enabled by an analytical expression for the Pauli basis coefficients that reduces the memory requirement from $\mathcal{O}(2^{n+1})$ to $\mathcal{O}(2n)$. To address the second, we propose a multistage state-refinement heuristic that accelerates ITE convergence, reducing convergence time by up to two orders of magnitude. Using this TN framework, we compute the first 32 eigenstates of a Laplacian of dimension exceeding $10^6$ with fidelity above $0.95$ using a 20-qubit MPO. We further validate the method on the 2D anharmonic oscillator and investigate disordered systems, where increasing random potential strength degrades accuracy and limits the approach.
summary:
随着离散微分算子维数的增加，用于求解偏微分方程 (PDE) 的经典数值技术的计算成本变得昂贵。对于引起 Sturm--Liouville 问题的偏微分方程，张量网络 (TN) 方法可以非常高效：维度 $N\times N$ 的算子可以仅使用 $n=\log_2(N)$ 量子位表示为矩阵乘积算子 (MPO)，从而能够通过虚时间演化 (ITE) 计算特征值和特征向量。然而，这在计算上仍然具有挑战性。首先，大多数在没有显式张量积结构的情况下生成大型算子 MPO 的方法都需要非常大的内存。其次，传统 ITE 中收敛的 Trotterization 步骤数量随着 $n$ 快速增加。我们提出了一些技术来缓解某些稀疏、结构化微分算子的这两个挑战。为了解决第一个问题，我们通过扩展泡利弦基中的运算符来构造 MPO，通过泡利基系数的分析表达式来实现，从而将内存需求从 $\mathcal{O}(2^{n+1})$ 减少到 $\mathcal{O}(2n)$。

为了解决第二个问题，我们提出了一种多阶段状态细化启发式方法，可以加速 ITE 收敛，将收敛时间缩短两个数量级。使用此 TN 框架，我们使用 20 量子位 MPO 计算维度超过 10^6 美元的拉普拉斯算子的前 32 个本征态，保真度高于 0.95 美元。我们进一步在二维非简谐振子上验证该方法并研究无序系统，其中增加随机势强度会降低准确性并限制该方法。

title: Efficient High-Dimensional Quantum Circuit Synthesis: From Multi-Controlled Gates to Isometries and Quantum Channels
abstract: Circuit synthesis of multi-controlled gates is crucial for qudit ($d$-level) quantum computing. This paper presents efficient synthesis schemes that reduce the elementary gate count for multi-controlled single-qudit gates. For synthesizing general $(n-1)$-controlled unitaries on $n$ qudits, we reduce the controlled-increment (CINC) and generalized controlled-$X$ (GCX) gate counts to $O(n^2)$, improving upon existing $O(n^{2+\log_2 d})$ CINC and $O(n^3)$ GCX bounds. For $(n-1)$-controlled special unitaries, this complexity is further reduced to $O(n)$. By utilizing the proposed circuit, we present qudit-based circuit constructions for isometries and quantum channels from $n$ to $m$ qudits. When specialized to general $n$-qudit unitaries, our construction requires fewer CINC gates than previous results. Moreover, for the first time, we present a circuit synthesis scheme for single-controlled gates using SUM gates and single-qudit gates when $d$ is prime. This enables all CINC-based circuits for various quantum operations to be converted into SUM-gate circuits while preserving the same asymptotic complexity. Finally, we establish a theoretical lower bound on the number of SUM and CINC gates required to synthesize general $n$-qudit unitaries.
summary:
多控门的电路综合对于qudit（$d$级）量子计算至关重要。本文提出了有效的综合方案，可以减少多控制单量子门的基本门数量。为了在 $n$ qudits 上合成通用 $(n-1)$ 控制酉，我们将受控增量 (CINC) 和广义受控 $X$ (GCX) 门计数减少到 $O(n^2)$，改进了现有的 $O(n^{2+\log_2 d})$ CINC 和 $O(n^3)$ GCX 边界。对于 $(n-1)$ 控制的特殊单一系统，这种复杂性进一步降低到 $O(n)$。通过利用所提出的电路，我们提出了基于 qudit 的电路结构，用于等距和从 $n$ 到 $m$ qudits 的量子通道。当专门用于通用 $n$-qudit 酉时，我们的构造需要比以前的结果更少的 CINC 门。此外，我们首次提出了当$d$为质数时使用SUM门和单qudit门的单控制门的电路综合方案。这使得用于各种量子运算的所有基于 CINC 的电路都可以转换为 SUM 门电路，同时保留相同的渐近复杂性。

最后，我们建立了合成通用 $n$-qudit 幺正所需的 SUM 和 CINC 门数量的理论下限。

title: Möbius-Guided Diagonal-Gate Compilation with Native Multiqubit Controlled-Phase Gates on Neutral-Atom Processors
abstract: Diagonal gates are ubiquitous primitives in quantum algorithms, from phase oracles, hypergraph-state preparation, and multi-control logic to Hamiltonian simulation of spin models and digitized lattice field theories, where Ising interactions and local potential terms are diagonal in the encoded basis. Standard compilers, however, often lower diagonal structure into one- and two-qubit gates before neutral-atom hardware can exploit native Rydberg-mediated multiqubit controlled-phase operations. We propose a Möbius-guided compiler that maps a diagonal phase function to a phase hypergraph via subset-lattice Möbius inversion. The hypergraph retains the support and angle of each many-body phase term, allowing sparse or local high-order structure to be routed as native multiqubit controlled-phase candidates when feasible and decomposed otherwise. The neutral-atom scheduler accounts for atom motion, interaction-zone constraints, blockade feasibility, and error costs, enabling a direct comparison between native high-order execution and decomposed alternatives. Benchmarks against routed ZAP and ZX-calculus baselines show improved estimated success for algorithmic instances with exploitable three- and four-body phase terms, and comparable performance on predominantly two-body instances. These results provide a feasible compilation strategy for more fully exploiting the native capabilities of neutral-atom hardware, using atom reconfigurability and Rydberg-mediated multiqubit phase operations as practical resources for more efficient quantum computation.
summary:
对角门是量子算法中无处不在的原语，从相位预言、超图状态准备和多控制逻辑到自旋模型和数字化晶格场论的哈密顿模拟，其中伊辛相互作用和局部势项在编码基础中是对角的。然而，在中性原子硬件可以利用本机里德堡介导的多量子位控制相位操作之前，标准编译器通常会将对角线结构降低为一量子位门和二量子位门。我们提出了一种莫比乌斯引导编译器，通过子集格莫比乌斯逆演将对角相位函数映射到相位超图。超图保留每个多体相项的支持和角度，允许稀疏或局部高阶结构在可行时作为本机多量子位控制相候选者路由，否则进行分解。中性原子调度器考虑了原子运动、交互区域约束、封锁可行性和错误成本，从而能够直接比较本机高阶执行和分解的替代方案。

针对路由 ZAP 和 ZX 微积分基线的基准测试表明，具有可利用的三体和四体相项的算法实例的估计成功率有所提高，并且在主要是两体实例上的性能相当。这些结果提供了一种可行的编译策略，可以更充分地利用中性原子硬件的本机功能，使用原子可重构性和里德堡介导的多量子位相操作作为更有效量子计算的实用资源。

title: Quantum linear solvers for quantum chemistry: prospects of exponential quantum advantage
abstract: Quantum linear solvers (QLSs) can offer the potential for exponential quantum advantage in solving quantum chemical problems, but its assessment hinges on determining the condition number ($\kappa$) scaling, which itself is computationally challenging. While a recent work applied the Harrow-Hassidim-Lloyd (HHL) algorithm to single-reference linearized coupled cluster equations (SRLCC), the validity of the HHL-SRLCC framework is restricted to weakly correlated regimes. A general treatment requires a formulation that can access strongly correlated regions. We thus begin by extending the QLS-SRLCC framework to its multi-reference form, which is based on the internally contracted multi-reference LCC method (QLS-icMRLCC). We then analyze $\kappa$ scaling using three complementary diagnostics that range from explicit computations to use of indirect structural indicators: (i) direct calculations of $\kappa$, (ii) scaling of the ratio of maximum to minimum diagonal entries of an A matrix, and (iii) structural analyses of the A matrices based on a recently proposed conjecture, which we adapt to the QLS-LCC problem. The three approaches yield consistent predictions, indicating a polylogarithmic $\kappa$ scaling in system size. This finding, when combined with our arguments on sub-linear scaling of sparsity, supports the prospects of exponential advantage using QLSs for the LCC problem. Finally, numerical calculations on potential energy curves of model systems containing up to four atoms recover the ground state energies with errors relative to benchmark classical methods not exceeding 0.009$\%$.
summary:
量子线性求解器（QLS）可以在解决量子化学问题时提供指数量子优势的潜力，但其评估取决于确定条件数（$\kappa$）缩放，这本身在计算上具有挑战性。虽然最近的一项工作将 Harrow-Hassidim-Lloyd (HHL) 算法应用于单参考线性化耦合聚类方程 (SRLCC)，但 HHL-SRLCC 框架的有效性仅限于弱相关状态。一般治疗需要一种能够进入强相关区域的配方。因此，我们首先将 QLS-SRLCC 框架扩展到其多参考形式，该形式基于内部契约的多参考 LCC 方法 (QLS-icMRLCC)。然后，我们使用从显式计算到使用间接结构指标的三种补充诊断来分析 $\kappa$ 缩放：(i) $\kappa$ 的直接计算，(ii) A 矩阵的最大与最小对角线条目之比的缩放，以及 (iii) 基于最近提出的猜想对 A 矩阵进行结构分析，我们将其应用于 QLS-LCC 问题。

这三种方法产生了一致的预测，表明系统大小呈多对数 $\kappa$ 缩放。这一发现与我们关于稀疏性的次线性标度的论点相结合，支持了使用 QLS 解决 LCC 问题的指数优势的前景。最后，对包含多达四个原子的模型系统的势能曲线进行数值计算，恢复基态能量，相对于基准经典方法的误差不超过0.009$\%$。

title: Works on My QPU: Reproducibility in Quantum Computing Research
abstract: Quantum computing research increasingly depends on complex software stacks, yet the reproducibility of published results does not receive the priority and longevity mandated by recommendations of large international scientific bodies and best practices in software-centric systems research. In this paper, we present a combined manual and automated large-scale analysis of the reproducibility landscape in quantum computing research, quantify shortcomings, and derive actionable steps forward. We manually evaluate a curated sample of 127 papers using a five-question framework that covers code availability, environment specification, documentation, hardware description, and executability. To place these findings in a broader context, we conduct an automated large-scale screening of nearly 5000 quantum computing papers for the same reproducibility indicators. Our manual analysis reveals that only 24.4% of the sampled papers provide code artefacts, and among those, 64.5% fail to execute successfully in a clean environment. This assessment is corroborated by a large-scale automated analysis that yields a consistent code availability rate of 26.8%. Further, it shows that approximately one-third of the papers with accessible code lack machine-readable environment specifications. The results in this paper indicate that reproducibility is not yet consistently achieved in quantum computing research. In response, we outline a set of practical recommendations that address the observed failure modes and illustrate how reproducibility can be improved in practice.
summary:
量子计算研究越来越依赖于复杂的软件堆栈，但已发表结果的可重复性并未得到大型国际科学机构的建议和以软件为中心的系统研究的最佳实践所要求的优先级和长期性。在本文中，我们对量子计算研究中的可重复性景观进行了手动和自动相结合的大规模分析，量化了缺点，并得出了可行的前进步骤。我们使用包含代码可用性、环境规范、文档、硬件描述和可执行性的五个问题框架手动评估由 127 篇论文组成的精选样本。为了将这些发现放在更广泛的背景下，我们对近 5000 篇量子计算论文进行了自动化大规模筛选，以寻找相同的再现性指标。我们的手动分析显示，只有 24.4% 的样本论文提供了代码伪影，其中 64.5% 的论文无法在干净的环境中成功执行。这一评估得到了大规模自动化分析的证实，该分析产生了 26.8% 的一致代码可用性。

此外，它还表明，大约三分之一具有可访问代码的论文缺乏机器可读的环境规范。本文的结果表明，量子计算研究尚未始终如一地实现可重复性。作为回应，我们概述了一系列实用建议，解决观察到的故障模式，并说明如何在实践中提高可重复性。

title: Grokking and epoch-wise double descent in quantum neural networks
abstract: Grokking, the delayed transition from memorization to generalization, is a fundamental phenomenon in gradient-based learning, yet its dynamics within variational quantum machine learning (QML) remain largely unexamined. In this work, we report the empirical observation of both the grokking transition and epoch-wise double descent in a two-qubit quantum neural network (QNN) under a complete parameterization of the SU(4) manifold. We demonstrate that overparameterization via increased circuit depth improves the probability of successful generalization. Notably, these architectures frequently exhibit an epoch-wise double descent in test error, degrading at a critical epoch before recovering into a generalizing state. Crucially, we identify a generalization decay in late-stage training, where the test error increases significantly despite a stagnant training loss. Bridging this behavior with algorithmic stability theory, our analysis reveals that this decay correlates with an unconstrained increase of the weight-norm, drifting away from sparse, phase-aligned harmonic solutions toward overfitted solutions in the Hilbert space. We analyze the underlying temporal dynamics of this transition, demonstrating how the onset of generalization is linked to optimization hyperparameters such as learning rate and weight decay. Finally, to mitigate late-stage decay, we introduce a weak explicit weight-norm regularization into the loss function. We demonstrate that this structural anchor stabilizes the post-grokking phase and permanently preserves generalization gains, providing a robust framework for training overparameterized quantum circuits.
summary:
Grokking，即从记忆到泛化的延迟过渡，是基于梯度的学习中的一个基本现象，但其在变分量子机器学习 (QML) 中的动态在很大程度上仍未得到检验。在这项工作中，我们报告了在 SU(4) 流形的完整参数化下双量子位量子神经网络 (QNN) 中的 grokking 转变和历元双下降的经验观察。我们证明，通过增加电路深度进行过度参数化可以提高成功泛化的可能性。值得注意的是，这些架构经常表现出测试误差的历元双重下降，在恢复到泛化状态之前在关键时期退化。至关重要的是，我们发现了后期训练中的泛化衰减，尽管训练损失停滞，但测试误差却显着增加。将这种行为与算法稳定性理论联系起来，我们的分析表明，这种衰减与权重范数的无约束增加相关，从稀疏的、相位对齐的谐波解转向希尔伯特空间中的过拟合解。

我们分析了这种转变的潜在时间动态，展示了泛化的开始如何与学习率和权重衰减等优化超参数联系起来。最后，为了减轻后期衰减，我们在损失函数中引入了弱显式权重范数正则化。我们证明，这种结构锚点可以稳定后理解阶段并永久保留泛化增益，为训练超参数化量子电路提供强大的框架。

title: Parallel QEC Decoding Applied to Distributed Quantum Computing
abstract: A novel parallel approach is proposed for QEC decoding based on Belief Propagation with Ordered Statistics Decoding. The main idea is to pre-process the error vectors obtained from Belief Propagation by applying Singular Value Decomposition locally to sub-regions of the lattice. The proposed approach is applied to distributed quantum computers and evaluated in terms of complexity, accuracy, and scalability.
summary: 提出了一种基于有序统计解码置信传播的 QEC 解码并行方法。主要思想是通过将奇异值分解局部应用于格子的子区域来预处理从置信传播获得的误差向量。所提出的方法应用于分布式量子计算机，并在复杂性、准确性和可扩展性方面进行评估。

title: Non-Hermitian topology driven by an identity term: An exactly solvable paradigm
abstract: An identity term in the Hamiltonian is conventionally regarded as spectrally inert-it shifts energies but does not alter eigenstate topology. We show that under non-Hermitian skin pumping, this paradigm fails: a momentum-dependent identity term actively deforms the generalized Brillouin zone, thereby challenging established topological criteria that rely on fixed complex contours. Here, by introducing spin-orbit coupling into a Hatano-Nelson chain, we present an exact analytical solution for the entire non-Hermitian eigensystem under open boundary conditions. Our solution reveals how inter-cell spin-orbit coupling, synergizing with this non-trivial identity term, induces topological edge states and robust zero modes in the complete absence of chiral symmetry. This work establishes an exactly solvable paradigm for non-Hermitian topology beyond symmetry protection, and provides a rigorous benchmark for testing topological invariants in systems with momentum-dependent identity terms.
summary: 哈密​​顿量中的恒等项通常被认为是光谱惰性的，它会改变能量但不会改变本征态拓扑。我们表明，在非厄米表层泵浦下，这种范式失败了：动量相关的恒等项主动使广义布里渊区变形，从而挑战依赖于固定复杂轮廓的既定拓扑标准。在这里，通过将自旋轨道耦合引入 Hatano-Nelson 链，我们提出了开放边界条件下整个非厄米本征系统的精确解析解。我们的解决方案揭示了单元间自旋轨道耦合如何与这个重要的恒等项协同作用，在完全不存在手性对称性的情况下诱导拓扑边缘态和鲁棒的零模式。这项工作为超越对称性保护的非厄米拓扑建立了一个完全可解的范式，并为测试具有动量相关恒等项的系统中的拓扑不变量提供了严格的基准。

title: The Langevin-equation description of optomechanics with the dispersive and dissipative optomechanical coupling
abstract: The description of the optomechanical system is commonly based on the quantum Langevin equation formalism. This framework is introduced phenomenologically or based on a model Hamiltonian. However, once dealing with the optomechanical Fabry-Perot cavity or the modified Michelson-Sagnac interferometer with a semitransparent mechanically active membrane inside, a model-free consideration is also possible by using an alternative approach. Such an approach, which is based on the classical wave equations in the systems, is popular in the gravitational-wave community where it is termed as input-output relations approach. In this work, using the aforementioned approach, we derived the equations for the ladder operator of the intracavity field, stochastic back-action force, and the relation between the fields at the input mirror. Then we simplified the obtained results down to the range of applicability of the Langevin equation formalism and compared these with the corresponding predictions of the latter formalism. This enabled us to critically assess the validity of the Langevin equation formalism and rectify its range of applicability. In the case where the dissipative optomechanical coupling is involved we identified appreciable problems with this formalism. We found that, disregarding the fact that decay rate of the optomechanical Fabry-Perot cavity depends on its length, no dissipative optomechanical coupling is generated. This is in contrast with the prediction of the standard Langevin-equation based treatment. We found that, staying inside the range of applicability of the Langevin equation formalism, the relation between the fields at the input mirror may not be correct. We found that the Langevin equation formalism misses a phase factor at the input field, this factor turns out to be important for the situation involving the dissipative optomechanical coupling.
summary:
光机械系统的描述通常基于量子朗之万方程形式。该框架是从现象学角度引入的或基于哈密顿量模型。然而，一旦处理光机械法布里-珀罗腔或内部带有半透明机械活性膜的改进型迈克尔逊-萨格纳克干涉仪，通过使用替代方法也可以进行无模型考虑。这种基于系统中经典波动方程的方法在引力波界很流行，被称为输入-输出关系方法。在这项工作中，使用上述方法，我们推导了腔内场的梯子算子、随机反作用力以及输入镜处的场之间的关系的方程。然后我们将所得结果简化到朗之万方程形式主义的适用范围，并将其与后一种形式主义的相应预测进行比较。这使我们能够批判性地评估朗之万方程形式的有效性并纠正其适用范围。

在涉及耗散光机耦合的情况下，我们发现这种形式主义存在明显的问题。我们发现，忽略光机械法布里-珀罗腔的衰减率取决于其长度的事实，不会产生耗散光机械耦合。这与基于标准朗之万方程的治疗的预测形成对比。我们发现，在朗之万方程形式的适用范围内，输入镜处的场之间的关系可能不正确。我们发现朗之万方程形式在输入场中遗漏了一个相位因子，该因子对于涉及耗散光机耦合的情况非常重要。

title: An Effective Quantum Hoare Logic for Hybrid Quantum Programs with Unbounded Loops
abstract: While quantum hardware remains limited, hybrid quantum-classical algorithms with complex control structures, including unbounded loops, are emerging, posing new challenges for quantum program analysis, including the accurate estimation of the resource consumption of a given program. Meanwhile, precise analysis techniques such as symbolic execution have largely left out hybridization and unbounded recursion. On the other hand, current quantum Hoare logics that generally support them are lacking in expressiveness and miss out on efficient computational equational reasoning that could be implemented in a semi-automated tool. This leaves a gap awaiting to be filled. In this work, we answer this challenge with the first semi-automated static analysis solution combining effective functional verification and resource (termination or cost) estimation for hybrid quantum programs with unbounded loops. Towards that end, we introduce integer hybrid path-sums (IHPS), extending path-sums to handle unbounded while loops, as a representation of possible executions of a program. A generic strategy for determining termination and expected resource consumption via loop invariants is also proposed and illustrated on several examples. Finally, the solution is implemented as a semi-automatic Haskell program. This work is the first step toward the design of a complete static resource analysis tool for hybrid quantum programs, essential for the development of real-world quantum computing.
summary:
虽然量子硬件仍然有限，但具有复杂控制结构（包括无界循环）的混合量子经典算法正在出现，给量子程序分析带来了新的挑战，包括准确估计给定程序的资源消耗。与此同时，诸如符号执行之类的精确分析技术在很大程度上忽略了混合和无界递归。另一方面，当前普遍支持它们的量子霍尔逻辑缺乏表达能力，并且错过了可以在半自动化工具中实现的高效计算方程推理。这留下了一个等待填补的空白。在这项工作中，我们通过第一个半自动静态分析解决方案来应对这一挑战，该解决方案将有效的功能验证和具有无界循环的混合量子程序的资源（终止或成本）估计相结合。为此，我们引入整数混合路径和（IHPS），扩展路径和以处理无界 while 循环，作为程序可能执行的表示。

还提出了一种通过循环不变量确定终止和预期资源消耗的通用策略，并在几个示例中进行了说明。最后，该解决方案被实现为半自动 Haskell 程序。这项工作是为混合量子程序设计完整的静态资源分析工具的第一步，这对于现实世界量子计算的发展至关重要。

title: QSCOUT's Qubit-Boson Gate Set
abstract: The Quantum Scientific Computing Open User Testbed (QSCOUT) has developed a qubit-boson gate set for hybrid continuous-discrete variable (CV-DV) quantum computing. This document outlines how to utilize these gates on QSCOUT using Just Another Quantum Assembly Language, Jaqal\textsuperscript{TM}.
summary: 量子科学计算开放用户测试台 (QSCOUT) 开发了一套用于混合连续离散变量 (CV-DV) 量子计算的量子比特-玻色子门组。本文档概述了如何使用另一种量子汇编语言 Jaqal\textsuperscript{TM} 在 QSCOUT 上使用这些门。

title: Distributed Monogamy of Entanglement limits Quantum Channel Simulation
abstract: Entanglement is monogamous: if it is shared among more than two parties, the entanglement between any pair cannot be very strong. For an integer $k\geq 2$, $k$-extendibility of a state $\rho_{AB}$ quantifies this as the number of copies of $B$ that can be simulated by the state's environment. We introduce fractional extendibility, which gives a finer characterization of the quantum correlation that is leaked to the environment, and prove that it is invariant under tensor products and monotonic under local processing. We also establish the distributed monogamy of entanglement: for any state on $AB_1B_2\dots B_n$, the maximum average probability of extracting an EPR pair from a random subset of $k \leq n/2$ systems among the $B_i$'s is the fraction $k/n$. With these tools we show that any quantum erasure channel with erasure probability more than a half cannot simulate a less noisy erasure channel, even with asymptotically many uses of the more noisy channel.
summary: 纠缠是一夫一妻制的：如果纠缠由多于两方共享，则任何对之间的纠缠都不会很强。对于整数 $k\geq 2$，状态 $\rho_{AB}$ 的 $k$-可扩展性将其量化为状态环境可以模拟的 $B$ 副本数量。我们引入了分数可扩展性，它可以更精细地表征泄漏到环境中的量子相关性，并证明它在张量积下是不变的，在局部处理下是单调的。我们还建立了纠缠的分布式一夫一妻制：对于 $AB_1B_2\dots B_n$ 上的任何状态，从 $B_i$ 中的 $k \leq n/2$ 系统的随机子集中提取 EPR 对的最大平均概率是分数 $k/n$。通过这些工具，我们表明，任何擦除概率超过一半的量子擦除通道都无法模拟噪声较小的擦除通道，即使渐进地多次使用噪声较大的通道也是如此。

title: Operational meaning of Markov gap in tripartite entanglement of quantum dynamics
abstract: We investigate how irreducible multipartite entanglement, a long-range correlation by nature, can emerge from short-range dynamics far from equilibrium. Focusing on the Markov gap as a probe of irreducible tripartite entanglement (IrTE) in free-fermion chains, we uncover qualitatively distinct dynamical behaviors: the Markov gap grows either quasi-linearly or in staircase-like jumps depending on the initial state. We also propose attainable upper and lower bounds for the onset time of IrTE based on the Lieb-Robinson bound. Strikingly, the Markov gap saturates to a volume-law value on a timescale $t\sim\! L^2$, much slower than the ballistic spreading of bipartite correlations. To understand what information about the wavefunctions is revealed by the Markov gap calculation, we introduce the concept of essential tripartite fermion (ETF) and an associated tripartite null matrix. The value of Markov gap closely tracks the number of small singular values of this tripartite null matrix, yielding a transparent, operational physical interpretation of the measure. We further demonstrate that several dynamical signatures persist in the interacting XXZ chain.
summary: 我们研究了不可约的多方纠缠（本质上是一种长程相关性）如何从远离平衡的短程动态中出现。着眼于马尔可夫间隙作为自由费米子链中不可约三方纠缠（IrTE）的探针，我们发现了定性上不同的动力学行为：马尔可夫间隙根据初始状态以准线性或阶梯状跳跃的方式增长。我们还根据 Lieb-Robinson 界提出了 IrTE 起始时间可达到的上限和下限。引人注目的是，马尔可夫间隙在时间尺度 $t\sim\! 上饱和到体积定律值。 L^2$，比二分相关性的弹道传播慢得多。为了理解马尔可夫间隙计算揭示了波函数的哪些信息，我们引入了基本三方费米子 (ETF) 和相关三方零矩阵的概念。马尔可夫间隙的值密切跟踪该三方零矩阵的小奇异值的数量，从而产生对该测量的透明的、可操作的物理解释。我们进一步证明了交互的 XXZ 链中存在多个动态签名。

title: A Nonstabilizerness Resource Law for Universal Quantum State Purification
abstract: Quantum state purification aims to recover higher-fidelity quantum states from multiple noisy copies and is a fundamental primitive for quantum information processing. Magic resources enable operations beyond classically simulable dynamics and are central to universal fault-tolerant quantum computation. Recent no-go results show that classically simulable operations cannot achieve a nontrivial universal fidelity gain. This motivates a quantitative theory of the magic required for purification at prescribed success probability and target fidelity. For universal purification with two input copies, we prove an exact linear mana law in odd dimensions and a two-sided linear robustness law for multi-qubit systems, which becomes exact for a single qubit. We also identify an explicit successful purification map that makes the tradeoff transparent. These results establish universal purification as a task obeying a quantitative magic-fidelity law and link magic resources to error mitigation and fault-tolerant quantum information processing.
summary: 量子态纯化旨在从多个噪声副本中恢复更高保真度的量子态，是量子信息处理的基本原语。魔法资源使操作能够超越经典的可模拟动力学，并且是通用容错量子计算的核心。最近的无效结果表明，经典的可模拟操作无法实现非凡的通用保真度增益。这激发了以规定的成功概率和目标保真度净化所需的魔法的定量理论。对于具有两个输入副本的通用纯化，我们证明了奇数维度中的精确线性法力定律和多量子位系统的两侧线性鲁棒性定律，这对于单个量子位来说变得精确。我们还确定了一个明确的成功纯化图，使权衡变得透明。这些结果将通用净化确立为遵守定量魔幻保真定律的任务，并将魔力资源与错误缓解和容错量子信息处理联系起来。

title: Symmetry as a route to generalized bosonic Kitaev chains
abstract: The bosonic Kitaev chain (BKC) model is a deceptively simple looking quadratic pairing Hamiltonian. Despite being purely Hermitian, it exhibits a number of striking non-Hermitian topological phenomena, including skin effects. We show here how symmetries play a key role in this model, and how identifying these allows one to develop generalized BKC-like models. We emphasize the surprising fact that any quadratic bosonic pairing Hamiltonian with a sublattice (chiral) symmetry necessarily has a dynamical matrix with an effective time reversal symmetry. This symmetry is unrelated to physical time-reversal, but enables non-trivial topological invariants. We also discuss how this symmetry is unrelated to another key property of the BKC, the decoupling of quadrature dynamics. This feature can instead be connected to a distinct symmetry, namely an effective particle-hole symmetry of the dynamical matrix. We discuss non-trivial generalized BKC models that only keep one of these two effective symmetries intact. We also provide a classification of all translationally-invariant 1D pairing Hamiltonians, and show connections between the BKC and a well-studied non-Hermitian fermionic system, the symplectic Hatano-Nelson model.
summary:
玻色基塔耶夫链 (BKC) 模型是一个看似简单的二次配对哈密顿量。尽管它是纯粹的厄米特拓扑，但它表现出许多引人注目的非厄米特拓扑现象，包括集肤效应。我们在此展示对称性如何在此模型中发挥关键作用，以及识别对称性如何允许人们开发类似于 BKC 的广义模型。我们强调一个令人惊讶的事实，即任何具有亚晶格（手性）对称性的二次玻色子配对哈密顿量都必然具有具有有效时间反转对称性的动力学矩阵。这种对称性与物理时间反转无关，但实现了非平凡的拓扑不变量。我们还讨论了这种对称性如何与 BKC 的另一个关键属性（正交动力学解耦）无关。相反，该特征可以与独特的对称性相关联，即动力学矩阵的有效粒子空穴对称性。我们讨论仅保持这两种有效对称性之一完整的非平凡广义 BKC 模型。

我们还提供了所有平移不变的一维配对哈密顿量的分类，并显示了 BKC 和经过充分研究的非厄米费米子系统（辛 Hatano-Nelson 模型）之间的联系。

title: Temperature Beyond Equilibrium in Isolated Quantum Many-Body Systems and Their Subsystems
abstract: Temperature is one of the central concepts of thermodynamics, yet its meaning away from equilibrium remains elusive. This problem is particularly acute in isolated quantum many-body systems: their states evolve unitarily, need not be close to equilibrium, and can retain energy coherence, a feature with no classical thermodynamic analogue. A non-stationary quantum state contains two kinds of energy fluctuations. One is associated with energy populations and has the usual thermodynamic interpretation; the other arises from coherence between energy sectors and drives time dependence. We propose that temperature, also out of equilibrium, locates the state within the family of regular states compatible with its energy-coherence structure. This leads to a natural definition of temperature for regular nonequilibrium states. The resulting inverse temperature is not generally the derivative of thermodynamic entropy with respect to energy. Indeed the principle of maximum entropy does not extend in its usual form; it is replaced by a principle of minimum discrimination information. We also develop the corresponding theory for subsystems, where temperature cannot in general be inferred from the reduced state alone. Instead, it is determined by the induced local thermodynamic structure, with boundary ambiguities removed in the thermodynamic limit.
summary:
温度是热力学的核心概念之一，但其远离平衡的含义仍然难以捉摸。这个问题在孤立的量子多体系统中尤其严重：它们的状态统一演化，不需要接近平衡，并且可以保持能量相干性，这是经典热力学类似物所没有的特征。非稳态量子态包含两种能量涨落。一种与能量总体相关，具有通常的热力学解释；另一个原因是能源部门之间的一致性，并导致时间依赖性。我们提出，同样不平衡的温度将状态定位在与其能量相干结构兼容的常规状态族中。这导致了常规非平衡态温度的自然定义。所得的温度倒数通常不是热力学熵相对于能量的导数。事实上，最大熵原理并没有以其通常的形式延伸。它被最小歧视信息原则所取代。

我们还为子系统开发了相应的理论，其中温度通常不能仅从还原态推断出来。相反，它是由诱导的局部热力学结构决定的，并在热力学极限中消除了边界模糊性。

title: Absence of quantum advantage for approximate spin glass optimization
abstract: We perform a semiclassical, large-spin S, analysis of the quantum approximate optimization algorithm (QAOA) on the Sherrington-Kirkpatrick (SK) model, using the truncated Wigner approximation. Fixing the QAOA angles to their previously determined optimal S=1/2 values, we observe a non-monotonic dependence of the final energy on the spin. At small S the semiclassics is dominated by noise, while the large-S limit is constrained by the exponential growth of the initial fluctuations. For a depth-p QAOA one achieves the optimal balance at S of order p, resulting in a convergence of the final energy to the Parisi value like log(p)/p. We find that the semiclassics slightly outperforms the true spin-1/2 QAOA, and thus suggest they both converge to the Parisi value in the same way. Finally, removing all the initial noise, and re-optimizing the parameters to account for that change, results in superior performance with 1/p convergence.
summary: 我们使用截断维格纳近似对 Sherrington-Kirkpatrick (SK) 模型上的量子近似优化算法 (QAOA) 进行半经典大自旋 S 分析。将 QAOA 角度固定为其先前确定的最佳 S=1/2 值，我们观察到最终能量对自旋的非单调依赖性。在小 S 时，半经典由噪声主导，而大 S 限制则受到初始波动的指数增长的限制。对于深度为 p 的 QAOA，可以在 p 阶 S 处实现最佳平衡，从而导致最终能量收敛到 Parisi 值，如 log(p)/p。我们发现半经典稍微优于真正的自旋 1/2 QAOA，因此表明它们都以相同的方式收敛到 Parisi 值。最后，消除所有初始噪声，并重新优化参数以解决该变化，从而获得 1/p 收敛的卓越性能。

title: Hockey stick $f$-divergences
abstract: In this paper we give a systematic and unified treatment and extensions of various results on a new notion of quantum $f$-divergences defined from quantum hockey stick divergences, the theory of which has been developed recently in \cite{BHT_fdiv,HircheTomamichel_integral,LiuHircheCheng2025}. In particular, we consider non-normalized states and hockey stick $f$-divergences defined from more general notions of quantum hockey stick divergences, as well as a somewhat more general form of the integral representation defined in terms of an additional real parameter. We also consider the extension of the theory to general von Neumann algebras, and extend various results from \cite{HircheTomamichel_integral,LiuHircheCheng2025} to this setting. Our main results here are the representation of the hockey stick $f$-divergences in terms of Neyman-Pearson error probabilities, which was given in the finite-dimensional case in \cite{LiuHircheCheng2025}, an extension of Jen\v cová's result \cite{Jencova2023} on the detection of reversibility of a quantum channel on a pair of states in terms of the hockey stick divergences, and an extension of a result in \cite{HircheTomamichel_integral} showing that the regularized hockey stick Rényi $\alpha$-divergences coincide with the Petz-type Rényi divergences for $\alpha\in(0,1)$ and with the sandwiched Rényi divergences for $\alpha>1$. Moreover, we give some partial results on the characterization of when different notions of quantum $f$-divergences give the same value on a pair of quantum states.
summary:
在本文中，我们对由量子曲棍球棒散度定义的量子 $f$ 散度的新概念进行了系统且统一的处理和各种结果的扩展，该理论最近在 \cite{BHT_fdiv,HircheTomamichel_integral,LiuHircheCheng2025} 中得到了发展。特别是，我们考虑从更一般的量子曲棍球棒散度概念定义的非归一化状态和曲棍球棒$f$散度，以及根据附加实参数定义的积分表示的更一般形式。我们还考虑将该理论扩展到一般冯诺依曼代数，并将 \cite{HircheTomamichel_integral,LiuHircheCheng2025} 的各种结果扩展到此设置。

我们这里的主要结果是用内曼-皮尔逊误差概率表示曲棍球棒 $f$ 散度，这是在 \cite{LiuHircheCheng2025} 中在有限维情况下给出的，是 Jen\v cová 结果 \cite{Jencova2023} 关于根据曲棍球棒散度检测一对状态上量子通道可逆性的扩展，以及一个扩展\cite{HircheTomamichel_integral} 中的结果表明，正则化曲棍球棒 Rényi $\alpha$-散度与 $\alpha\in(0,1)$ 的 Petz 型 Rényi 散度以及 $\alpha>1$ 的夹层 Rényi 散度一致。此外，我们还给出了一些关于当不同的量子 $f$ 散度概念在一对量子态上给出相同值时的表征的部分结果。

title: Irreducible Geometry of Higher-Order Correlator Families
abstract: Programmable quantum simulators are beginning to access correlators of increasing complexity, ranging from four-point out-of-time-ordered correlators to even higher-order many-body correlators. The theoretical framework for interpreting such data, however, remains comparatively underdeveloped. Although a variety of higher-order correlators can be constructed straightforwardly, their physical meaning is often difficult to infer. A further complication is that different correlators are generally not independent: some may be mutually redundant, while others may encode genuinely distinct information. These features make it necessary to analyze correlators not as isolated quantities, but as a structured family. In this work, we develop a geometric framework for the collective analysis of higher-order correlator families. By representing correlators as inner products between operator words, we recast each family as a geometry in operator space. The key idea is to introduce conditioning subspaces that separate this geometry into reducible information, already explained by a chosen resolved sector, and irreducible information, encoded in the residual correlator geometry. Focusing on the latter component, we define irreducible volume profiles that quantify how broadly the unexplained part of a correlator family spreads over independent geometric directions. This perspective leads to several complementary forms of conditioning. Canonical conditioning optimally explains a correlator family. Targeted conditioning fixes the resolved sector to isolate a chosen physical feature. Krylov and cross conditioning extend the framework from a single correlator family to comparisons among correlator geometries. Our framework reveals irreducible structures hidden at the level of individual correlator values and establishes correlator geometry as a higher-level description of quantum many-body dynamics.
summary:
可编程量子模拟器开始使用越来越复杂的相关器，从四点乱序相关器到更高阶的多体相关器。然而，解释这些数据的理论框架仍然相对不发达。尽管可以直接构造各种高阶相关器，但它们的物理意义通常难以推断。更复杂的是，不同的相关器通常不是独立的：一些相关器可能是相互冗余的，而另一些相关器可能编码真正不同的信息。这些特征使得有必要将相关器分析为一个结构化的族，而不是孤立的量。在这项工作中，我们开发了一个用于高阶相关器族集体分析的几何框架。通过将相关器表示为运算符单词之间的内积，我们将每个族重新构建为运算符空间中的几何图形。关键思想是引入条件子空间，将几何形状分离为可约信息（已由所选解析扇区解释）和不可约信息（编码在残差相关器几何形状中）。

着眼于后一个组成部分，我们定义了不可约体积分布，以量化相关器族中无法解释的部分在独立几何方向上的分布范围。这种观点导致了几种互补形式的调节。规范调节最佳地解释了相关器系列。有针对性的调节修复已解析的扇区以隔离选定的物理特征。 Krylov 和交叉调节将框架从单一相关器系列扩展到相关器几何形状之间的比较。我们的框架揭示了隐藏在各个相关器值级别的不可约结构，并将相关器几何建立为量子多体动力学的更高层次描述。
